svg.title: Information path through a transformer, decomposed into residual and attention steps
svg.desc: A 7 by 7 grid for the sentence "The lighthouse guided ships through stormy seas". Layers stack bottom-up; tokens read left-to-right. The highlighted amber path is an alternating staircase of vertical residual stream segments and horizontal attention read segments. Information from E1 reaches x77 via seven upward residual steps and six rightward attention steps; only the first upward step at column 1 reads a raw embedding.
svg.text: ↑ = residual stream (one layer) · → = attention read (at that layer's input row) · only E₁ → x₁¹ reads a raw embedding
